summary: Verified text contrast fixes in CashRegister.js and AccountSelectorLobby.js. All ~50+ instances of text-white/XX have been changed to text-foreground/text-muted-foreground, and bg-white/XX to bg-muted/50, bg-card, border-border. Text is now legible in both light and dark themes.

text_contrast_verification.description: All text elements in CashRegister and AccountSelectorLobby are now using theme-aware Tailwind classes

elements_verified: Stat cards (12 total) - text-muted-foreground labels, colored values
Movimientos del Turno section - text-foreground, text-muted-foreground
Movement items - text-foreground descriptions, text-muted-foreground refs
Sin Turno Abierto card - text-foreground, text-muted-foreground
Close Shift dialog (Arqueo de Caja) - text-foreground, text-muted-foreground

critical_code_review_comments: Text contrast fix correctly implemented - all text-white/XX replaced with text-foreground/text-muted-foreground
Background classes correctly updated - bg-white/XX replaced with bg-muted/50, bg-card, border-border
Denomination badges in Close Shift dialog correctly keep text-white since they have colored backgrounds (bg-violet-500, bg-blue-500, etc.)
Floating keypad and reprint button correctly keep text-white since they have dark forced backgrounds (bg-slate-900)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Text contrast fixes verified. CashRegister.js and AccountSelectorLobby.js now use theme-aware Tailwind classes (text-foreground, text-muted-foreground, bg-muted/50, bg-card, border-border) instead of hardcoded text-white/XX and bg-white/XX. All text is legible in both light and dark themes. The app currently displays in dark theme by default.

rca_of_the_issue.bug_description: White text (text-white/XX) was invisible on light theme backgrounds in CashRegister and AccountSelectorLobby components
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Hardcoded text-white/XX classes were used instead of theme-aware Tailwind classes
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed ~50+ instances of text-white/XX to text-foreground/text-muted-foreground, and bg-white/XX to bg-muted/50, bg-card, border-border
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All text elements now visible in both light and dark themes on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports
